title: Present Simple
rule: Present Simple hozirgi zamonda odatiy harakatlarni ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
example: I work every day.
explanation:
Subject + Verb (base) + Object
✅ He plays football
❌ He play football

title: Past Simple
rule: Past Simple o'tmishda bo'lib o'tgan harakatlarni ifodalaydi.
example: I worked yesterday.
explanation:
Subject + Verb (past) + Object
✅ She watched TV
❌ She watch TV

title: Present Continuous
rule: Hozir sodir bo'layotgan harakat.
example: I am reading a book.
explanation:
Subject + am/is/are + Verb(ing)
✅ They are playing
❌ They are play

title: Will (Future Simple)
rule: Kelajakdagi harakat yoki qaror.
example: I will help you tomorrow.
explanation:
Subject + will + Verb (base)
✅ She will come
❌ She will comes

title: Present Perfect
rule: Yaqinda tugagan yoki hali davom etayotgan harakat.
example: I have studied English for 5 years.
explanation:
Subject + have/has + Verb (past participle)
✅ He has gone
❌ He have gone

title: Present Perfect Continuous
rule: Boshidan beri davom etayotgan harakat.
example: I have been learning English since 2020.
explanation:
Subject + have/has + been + Verb(ing)
✅ She has been working
❌ She has been work

title: Passive Voice
rule: Harakat bajarilayotganini ifodalash (bajary otgani emas).
example: The book was written by the author.
explanation:
Subject + be + Verb (past participle)
✅ The cake is eaten
❌ The cake is eat

title: Conditional (If Clauses)
rule: Shart va natijani ifodalash.
example: If it rains, I will stay home.
explanation:
If + present → will + base
✅ If she comes, we will start
❌ If she will come, we start

title: Reported Speech
rule: Kimdir aytgan so'zni boshqacha aytish.
example: He said he was busy.
explanation:
Present → Past
yes/no → if/whether
✅ She said she would come
❌ She said she comes

title: Inversion
rule: Negativ yoki limited expression bilan qarama-qarshi tartibi.
example: Rarely have I seen such beauty.
explanation:
Negativ/Limited word + Auxiliary + Subject
✅ Only then did I understand
❌ Only then I understood

title: Modal Verbs
rule: Can, could, may, might, must, should - imkoniyat, ruxsat, zaruriyat ifodalash.
example: You should study harder.
explanation:
Subject + Modal + Verb (base)
✅ She can dance
❌ She can dances

title: Phrasal Verbs
rule: Verb + preposition/adverb kombinatsiyasi yangi ma'no beradi.
example: I have to look after my sister.
explanation:
Phrasal verbs talab qiladi qo'shimcha o'rganish
✅ Give up smoking
❌ Give smoking up

title: Articles (A/An/The)
rule: A/An - aniq bo'lmagan narsalar, The - aniq narsalar.
example: I have a cat. The cat is black.
explanation:
A/An + countable singular
The + specified noun
✅ I need a pen
❌ I need pen

title: Prepositions
rule: Soz/vaqt/joylash munosabatini ko'rsatadi: in, on, at, to, for.
example: I study at the library in the evening.
explanation:
IN - yil, oy, davr
ON - kun, sana
AT - aniq vaqt
✅ At 3 o'clock
❌ In 3 o'clock

title: Relative Clauses
rule: Who, which, that - batafsil ma'lumot berish uchun.
example: The person who helps me is my friend.
explanation:
Who - odamlar
Which - narsalar
That - har ikkalasi
✅ The book that I read
❌ The book what I read

title: Past Continuous
rule: O'tmishda sodir bo'layotgan harakat.
example: I was reading when the phone rang.
explanation:
Subject + was/were + Verb(ing)
✅ She was cooking
❌ She was cook

title: Past Perfect
rule: O'tmishdagi ikkita harakat - avvallari bo'lgan.
example: She had finished before he arrived.
explanation:
Subject + had + Verb (past participle)
✅ He had gone
❌ He had go

title: First Conditional (Real)
rule: Haqiqiy/ehtimol bo'luvchi shart.
example: If you study, you will pass the exam.
explanation:
If + present → will + base
Ehtimoli yuqori
✅ If it rains, I'll stay home
❌ If it will rain, I stay

title: Second Conditional (Unlikely)
rule: Ehtimoli past - kelib chiqmaydigan shart.
example: If I were rich, I would travel the world.
explanation:
If + past → would + base
Ehtimoli past
✅ If I had time, I would help
❌ If I have time, I would help

title: Question Formation
rule: Savol - do/does/did + subject + verb? yoki wh-words?
example: Do you like coffee? Where are you from?
explanation:
Yes/No Q: Auxiliary + Subject + Verb
Wh-Q: Wh-word + Auxiliary + Subject + Verb
✅ Does he play?
❌ He plays?

title: Comparatives & Superlatives
rule: Taqqoslash: -er/-est yoki more/most.
example: This book is more interesting than that one.
explanation:
Short: taller, faster
Long: more beautiful, more intelligent
Superlative: the tallest, the most beautiful
✅ She is smarter
❌ She is more smart

title: Gerunds & Infinitives
rule: Ing - gerund (ot sifatida), to - infinitiv (harakat).
example: I enjoy reading. I want to learn.
explanation:
Enjoy + -ing
Want + to + base
Some verbs both o'rnatadi
✅ Stop smoking
❌ Stop to smoke

title: Subject-Verb Agreement
rule: Subekt va verb bir-biriga mos kelib o'tasi kerak.
example: She walks. They walk.
explanation:
Singular + singular verb (he/she/it)
Plural + plural verb (they/we)
✅ He goes
❌ He go

title: Mixed Conditionals
rule: Shart va natija har xil vaqtda.
example: If I had studied, I would speak English well now.
explanation:
Past shart + present natija
Present shart + past natija
✅ If I had practiced, I would know
❌ If I practice, I would know
